violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
Chemicals were stored on top of container of brown sugar. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Thermometers are lacking in the (prep units and grab and go cooler) refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

(Pastries ) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
Pans and bag of bread were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

(Prosciutto) was observed held at (56) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
Chemicals were stored on the same shelf with food/equipment/single service articles in the (front counter area). New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Thermometers are lacking in the grab and go cooler and prep units.refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

(Pastries ) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Working containers of (dry ingredients ) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
(Food product and single service items ) were observed stored on the floor in the (kitchen and basement ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Placed in warewashing area to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
Handsink in kitchen was lacking hot water. Technician fixed during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
3 bay sink observed in poor repair. Observed a leak at plumbing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
The (ceiling ) in the (basement ) area is in poor repair.Observed leak in ceiling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Application was printed at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025
Establishment is lacking proper drain plugs for the wash and rinse bay of the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain drain plugs. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the (basement) refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
Inspector observed leakage at plumbing under 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
Menu and pastry display is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
